extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I counted only the “Against” rows, with criminal proceedings nil for the Company, Directors and Promoter (0), statutory/regulatory proceedings of 1 each against the Company, Directors and Promoter (3 total), and 72 tax proceedings against the Company; all “By” rows were excluded, and no subsidiary row was provided. The quantified litigation amount is the stated aggregate amount for “Against the Company” of ₹269.14 million; no separate subsidiary amount is disclosed, so this converts to ₹26.914 crore (269.14 ÷ 10), while promoter/director amounts are excluded. The contingent-liabilities table is consolidated and dated September 30, 2023, but it lists only component amounts and provides no stated Total row; therefore no total is extracted rather than summing the components. The company-wide top-five customer concentration for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2023, is 63.11% of revenue from operations; no company-wide top-ten figure is disclosed. Monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
